steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the Tehran Stock Exchange focuses on local companies and reflects “economic circumstances that are ______ Iran,” characterized as “unique, rapidly evolving local conditions.” The blank needs a phrase meaning particular to or specific to Iran.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'irrelevant to': would mean the conditions have nothing to do with Iran — the opposite of what the passage argues. ✗
  • Choice B — 'prohibitive in': would mean the conditions make investing too costly or restrictive in Iran. The passage frames the local focus as a benefit, not a barrier. ✗
  • Choice C — 'distinctive to': means particular or unique to Iran, directly matching “unique, rapidly evolving local conditions.” ✓
  • Choice D — 'unchanging in': directly contradicts “rapidly evolving.” ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
